title: Seared Cod with Japanese Glaze
description: A delicate Japanese dish featuring seared cod with a sweet and sticky glaze. Perfect for a special occasion or a romantic dinner.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine brown sugar, soy sauce, and 2 tbsp of water.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to a simmer.
Cook the glaze for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cod fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Brush the cod fillets with the Japanese glaze during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Garnish with moroccan mint and serve immediately.
